---
title: "Deeptools Report"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---


```{=html}
<style>
  .tab-navigator {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  .tab-navigator select {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 6px 10px;
    font-size: 14px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
  }
  .tab-navigator button {
    padding: 6px 14px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    background: #f8f9fa;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 14px;
  }
  .tab-navigator button:hover { background: #e2e6ea; }
  /* Hide the original tab bar */
  .panel-tabset .nav-tabs { display: none !important; }
</style>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  document.querySelectorAll(".panel-tabset").forEach(tabset => {
    const tabs = tabset.querySelectorAll(".nav-tabs .nav-link");
    if (tabs.length < 2) return;

    // Build navigator UI
    const nav = document.createElement("div");
    nav.className = "tab-navigator";

    const prev = document.createElement("button");
    prev.textContent = "◀ Prev";

    const select = document.createElement("select");
    tabs.forEach((tab, i) => {
      const opt = document.createElement("option");
      opt.value = i;
      opt.textContent = tab.textContent.trim();
      if (tab.classList.contains("active")) opt.selected = true;
      select.appendChild(opt);
    });

    const next = document.createElement("button");
    next.textContent = "Next ▶";

    nav.append(prev, select, next);
    tabset.prepend(nav);

    const goTo = (i) => {
      tabs[i].click();
      select.value = i;
    };

    select.addEventListener("change", () => goTo(+select.value));
    prev.addEventListener("click", () => {
      const cur = +select.value;
      goTo(cur > 0 ? cur - 1 : tabs.length - 1);
    });
    next.addEventListener("click", () => {
      const cur = +select.value;
      goTo(cur < tabs.length - 1 ? cur + 1 : 0);
    });
  });
});
</script>
```


## GC Bias
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

gc_plots <- list.files(path = ".", pattern = "_gc\\.png$", full.names = TRUE)
sample_names <- gsub("_gc\\.png$", "", basename(gc_plots))

cat("::: {.panel-tabset}\n\n")

for (i in seq_along(gc_plots)) {
  cat(paste0("## ", sample_names[i], "\n\n"))
  cat(paste0("![](", gc_plots[i], ")\n\n"))
}

cat(":::\n")
```
